manual_candidate_configs.name: Cautious
manual_candidate_configs.description: Very high confidence threshold with limited pseudo-label usage.

manual_candidate_configs.name: Precision First
manual_candidate_configs.description: High threshold with moderate pseudo-label count and cautious learning rate.

manual_candidate_configs.name: Balanced
manual_candidate_configs.description: Moderate threshold, pseudo-label count, and pseudo-label trust.

manual_candidate_configs.name: Aggressive Volume
manual_candidate_configs.description: Lower threshold and large pseudo-label batches to expand training data quickly.

manual_candidate_configs.name: Aggressive Trust
manual_candidate_configs.description: Moderate threshold paired with strong pseudo-label weighting.

manual_candidate_configs.name: Expansion First
manual_candidate_configs.description: Lower threshold and very high pseudo-label volume with a faster optimizer step.
